title: verbascum blattaria subsp. repandum
intro: Verbascum blattaria subsp. repandum, also known as the mullein plant, is a biennial plant belonging to the figwort family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of mullein include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Mullein can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, making it a popular choice among herbalists for its versatility and medicinal uses.
